title: Evangelions Complete Soundtrack
wikitext: []: Evangelion's Complete Soundtrack Post by Stryker » Wed Apr 24, 2013 9:25 pm [s]This guy has them all.[/s] Read the rules. There are some that weren't even included in the series, which are pretty good. Particularly, I find B-5 to be very interesting. It has a tense yet sangfroid feeling, with a quiet, yet powerful string section accompanied by a low brass and bells. Anyways, go check it out, it's very interesting.

Article: Evangelions Complete Soundtrack
[]: Evangelion's Complete Soundtrack Post by Stryker » Wed Apr 24, 2013 9:25 pm [s]This guy has them all.[/s] Read the rules. There are some that weren't even included in the series, which are pretty good. Particularly, I find B-5 to be very interesting. It has a tense yet sangfroid feeling, with a quiet, yet powerful string section accompanied by a low brass and bells. Anyways, go check it out, it's very interesting.
